title: Emotion Timeline Schema
description: JSON schema for the emotion recognition timeline output over a video/audio track.

video_id.description: Unique identifier for the video being analyzed.

total_duration_sec.description: Total duration of the analyzed media in seconds.

timeline.description: Array of emotion segments across the timeline.

start_time_sec.description: Start time of the segment in seconds.

end_time_sec.description: End time of the segment in seconds.

emotion.description: The primary emotion detected in this segment.

intensity.description: The intensity of the emotion, normalized between 0.0 and 1.0.

shift.description: Indicates the nature of the emotional transition into this segment, if applicable.

confidence.description: Confidence score of the associated emotion prediction.
